HSVString.description: string of the format `<h>a<s>a<b>a<s_checked>a<b_checked>` where <...> are values

ParticleString.description: list separated by `a`, check above for properties in order

fields.name: single_color_type
fields.note: that settings icon at the top of edit object that changes if single color objects are treated as base or detail

fields.name: linked_group
fields.note: the id of the editor link group this object is in (link controls)

fields.name: sound_duration
fields.note: affected by changing sfx, speed, start/end
